title: Design unified configuration schema (project key, workflows, priorities)
description: Define single Taskulus config schema usable by Python and Rust; decide required keys, validation, defaults, no fallbacks.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting investigation to answer user question about configuration system status and dotyaml plan.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Findings 2026-02-13: repo still uses project/config.yaml + .taskulus marker. Python loader taskulus/config_loader.py and Rust config.rs read config.yaml with defaults (DEFAULT_CONFIGURATION/default_project_configuration). No dotyaml crate or taskulus.yml present. dotyaml epic tskl-9nu.* all OPEN; config standardization tasks tskl-oju.* still unimplemented. Docs (README, CONFIGURATION, GETTING_STARTED, TROUBLESHOOTING) still reference config.yaml.

custom.beads_notes: Drafted unified schema and behaviors in docs/CONFIGURATION.md (taskulus.yml single-file, fixed hierarchy, workflow bindings, priorities + import mapping, dotyaml parity).
